overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a beach shoreline at sunset. The character moves through shallow surf past palm trees and beachfront buildings, rounds a rocky outcrop near Del Perro Pier, and encounters other pedestrians in the warm golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban beach with palm trees and waterfront buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow surf along the shoreline with palm trees visible inland

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction along the water's edge, passing by the ego character

entered.detail: calm ocean surf with gentle waves lapping at the shore
dark wet sand at the water's edge where waves recede
row of tall palm trees lining the beachfront
colorful beach structures and buildings with blue and red roofs

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an urban beach at sunset, moving through shallow water with palm trees and beachfront buildings visible on the left. A pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction as gentle waves lap at the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved beach shoreline approaching rocky outcrop

events.description: urban buildings fade from view as the beach curves toward open shoreline with rocks ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved beach shoreline as the sun sets over the ocean

entered.detail: large rock formation extending into the water ahead on the shoreline
large white cruise ship visible on the horizon against the sunset
long wooden pier structure with buildings extending over the water

segments.scene_description: The beach opens up as the character moves away from the urban area toward a rocky outcrop. The setting sun creates a warm glow over the water, and a cruise ship appears on the horizon while the Del Perro Pier comes into view in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky beach point with pier and yacht views

events.description: another pedestrian runs past from behind, moving in the same direction
character rounds the rocky outcrop, changing the relative position of water and landmarks

agents.ego_description: navigating around the rocky outcrop while passing another pedestrian, with the pier visible offshore

notable_agents.action: running past the ego character along the beach in the same direction

entered.detail: large luxury yacht anchored near the pier

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and rounds the rocky outcrop, passing a jogger on the beach. The Del Perro Pier and a luxury yacht are prominent in the background as the character navigates the curve of the shoreline, with the ocean shifting to the left side of the frame as the beach bends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal shoreline that transitions from an urban beachfront into a wide, open vista dominated by the Del Perro Pier. It begins with the character wading through shallow surf past palm trees and city buildings, passing a pedestrian as gentle waves lap the shore. As the character moves away from the urban area, the beach opens up and the lighting shifts into a warm golden glow, revealing a cruise ship on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the camera rounds a rocky outcrop and passes a jogger, bringing a luxury yacht and the pier into prominent view. Finally, the shoreline bends, causing the ocean to shift to the left side of the frame as the character navigates the curve of the beach.
